name: alert
description: A brief, important message that announces itself without interrupting the user's task -- distinct from alertdialog, which this repo does not adopt, because an alert never takes focus or blocks interaction.

requires.focus.unaffected: an alert must not receive or move keyboard focus
requires.content.noAutoDismiss: an alert must not disappear on a timer -- this comes from WCAG 2.2.3, not the APG page cited as this pattern's source, which is silent on dismissal timing
